ksa_text: Ability to document and communicate architecture rationale, design decisions, and constraints to both technical and non-technical stakeholders with clarity and precision.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of incident response tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies and procedures are in place to address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software and data and other supply chain issues.

top_anchors.element_label: Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.
Knowledge of incident response tools and techniques
Policies and procedures are in place to address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software and data and other supply chain issues.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-A-002 (DA, Ability) maps to Clinical Data Manager scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4368 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.437, dcwf=0.415, ddat=0.415. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within clinical data management, regulatory compliance, and healthcare analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4368 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DA-A-002 (DA, composite 0.4368) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles does not surface this DA-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4368 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DA domain content at composite 0.4368 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4368, domain DA. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
